verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 belongs to the IZUMO family. Other IZUMO members (IZUMO1, IZUMO3) are well-documented sperm-surface proteins critical for fertilization, and the family as a whole is associated with gamete surface display. Although the NCBI summary places IZUMO4 in the nucleus, HGNC family membership strongly hints at tissue-restricted (sperm/germline) surface biology. Applying the pre-no checklist: the IZUMO family lineage is a canonical gamete-surface family, so a nuclear annotation for one member does not override the developmental/germline surface biology likely shared by the family. This maps to contextual / tissue_restricted_surface.
